name: Dead Center
conditioned_path: aim-lab / target-accuracy skill tutorials that make you itch to hit pixel-perfect
mechanic: A reticle shrinks toward the bullseye; tap when it covers the exact center pixel. Your PB is the closest center-distance in pixels — lower is better, and the margin tightens each level.

name: Frame Lock
conditioned_path: 'wait for it' / perfectly-timed loop clips where one frame is the money shot
mechanic: A short animation loops; one frame per cycle has a perfect alignment. Tap exactly on that frame. Miss-timing is shown in milliseconds from perfect so you chase the zero.

name: Apex Tap
conditioned_path: trick-shot / peak-moment compilations that train your eye to hit the apex
mechanic: A ball bounces up and down; tap at the exact apex of each bounce. Bounces get faster and higher, shrinking the apex window until only frame-perfect taps keep the run alive.

name: One Cut
conditioned_path: satisfying perfect-cut / restock ASMR that sells the fantasy of one flawless motion
mechanic: A colored bar extends across the screen; tap once to stop it exactly at the target length. Length error is your score — the PB is the lowest total error across ten cuts.

name: Thread Needle
conditioned_path: sewing / craft precision tutorials where the clean thread is the whole payoff
mechanic: A tiny gap pulses open and shut; tap to send a thread through at the exact widest moment. Later levels add vibration that makes the window feel impossible.

name: Perfect Pour
conditioned_path: cooking / bartending 'perfect pour' clips that make you want to nail the line
mechanic: Hold to pour liquid into a vessel; release exactly when the fill line is hit. Overpour or underpour ends the run. PB is the closest fill % to the target across attempts.

name: Circle Judge
conditioned_path: perfect-circle challenges / handwriting perfection clips where the flawless stroke gets the clout
mechanic: Draw a circle in one thumb stroke. The game scores roundness, closure, and radius consistency as a single perfection %. PB is the highest %; 100 is the impossible ceiling.

name: Split Equal
conditioned_path: satisfying equal-split / portion-perfect content that rewards flawless division
mechanic: A line travels across the screen; tap to divide it into equal segments. Each round demands more cuts, and the variance from equal is your score — lower is better.

name: Tuning Match
conditioned_path: audio / perfect-pitch ASMR rabbit holes that promise the satisfaction of true unison
mechanic: Drag a pitch slider until two tones cancel into silence. Your distance from perfect unison is scored in cents. PB is the lowest cents — a race toward zero without time pressure.

name: Metronome Lock
conditioned_path: music / rhythm perfect-play covers where one missed beat breaks the flawless run
mechanic: A metronome ticks; tap exactly on each beat. Drift is shown in milliseconds and the track ends after 32 bars, giving a clean PB time to chase on every replay.

name: Zen Archer
conditioned_path: archery / target-sport PB compilations that glorify the one perfect release
mechanic: Hold to draw the bow, release at peak tension for a bullseye. Release too early or late and the arrow drifts. Wind adds micro-variance so mastery is measurable in millimeters.

name: Drop Flat
conditioned_path: satisfying landing / parkour perfect-landing clips where flat is the whole win
mechanic: A block falls and spins; tap to lock its rotation so it lands perfectly flat. Angle error is your score — 0 degrees is the PB, and falls get faster each attempt.

name: Snap Grid
conditioned_path: organization / 'everything in its place' satisfying grid content
mechanic: Drag a floating shape and release when it snaps perfectly into the grid. Snap distance is scored in pixels; later levels shrink the grid and add misaligned decoys.

name: Wire Walk
conditioned_path: steady-hand / 'don't touch the wire' challenge videos that turn precision into spectacle
mechanic: A dot travels a winding wire; tap and hold to guide it along the exact center. Any deviation from the wire ends the run. PB is the farthest distance you kept centered.

name: Stack Level
conditioned_path: perfect-stacking / Jenga / building tutorials where one misaligned block ruins the tower
mechanic: Blocks swing in from the sides; tap to drop each one flush on the stack. Misalignment accumulates until the tower topples. PB is the tallest perfectly aligned tower.

name: One Stroke Maze
conditioned_path: one-stroke drawing / 'perfect line' art challenges that reward a single clean motion
mechanic: Trace a maze in one continuous thumb stroke without lifting. Scored on smoothness and time; the PB is a combined clean-run score that rewards grace over speed.

name: Equal Arm
conditioned_path: balance / physics-perfect setup videos where equilibrium is the satisfying end-state
mechanic: Weights slide along a balance beam; tap to lock each weight so the arms balance exactly. Error is shown in grams, and the PB is the lowest total imbalance.

name: Peak Hold
conditioned_path: breath-hold / plank PB challenges where releasing at the right instant is everything
mechanic: Hold your thumb down while a meter rises to a green target zone, then release at the exact peak. Early or late costs distance from perfect. PB is the closest peak release in %.

name: Pixel Perfect
conditioned_path: pixel art / perfect-block placement clips where one wrong pixel ruins the piece
mechanic: Tap to place a pixel at exact coordinates on a grid. The grid zooms in and tolerance shrinks each level. PB is the highest level reached with zero misplaced pixels.

name: Rubik Sequence
conditioned_path: Rubik's solve / speedcubing PB clips that make you want a flawless memorized run
mechanic: A sequence of colored faces flashes; repeat it with taps in the exact order. Each perfect recall adds one more move. PB is the longest flawless sequence you can chain.
